summary: Single synthetic MM/FinTech account from inbound lead through close, onboarding, expansion trigger, brain reasoning, human co-definition, play execution, and renewal. Two of the steps below are REAL brain outputs from the prototype's eval harness — captured verbatim from prototype/brain_analysis_log.jsonl. Everything else is deterministic service-handoff narrative based on the canonical Tier 1 schema.

steps.title: Inbound: pricing-page activity + RevOps Director job posting
steps.what_changed: AGT-204 enriches firmographics + technographics. AGT-201 produces ICP score 78/100 → T1. AGT-202 routes to MM AE West with sequence_type='inbound_high_priority' (3-business-day SLA).
evidence: Accounts.icp_score=78, icp_tier=T1, segment=MM
EnrichmentLog: 6-category enrichment complete, intent decay applied
Leads: routed to MM AE West, sla=3bd, sequence_type=inbound_high_priority

steps.title: AGT-301 generates 10-step sequence; AGT-203 ABM playbook applied
steps.what_changed: AGT-301 emits CadenceEventLog rows for a 10-step priority sequence. AGT-203 marks abm_active=TRUE. AGT-302 applies 3-touch/week cap. AGT-303 will analyze sequence performance after 30 events.
evidence: CadenceEventLog: sequence_type='outbound_high_priority', priority_score_at_queue=78
ABMPlaybook: abm_active=TRUE (suppresses nurture per AGT-304)
Suppression check: routing_eligible=TRUE, no AGT-302 gate blocks

steps.title: Demo booked; AGT-305 generates discovery brief
steps.what_changed: Meeting booked event triggers AGT-305. 7-section discovery brief auto-generated (champion hypothesis: VP RevOps; pain hypothesis: cross-team consumption visibility).
evidence: DiscoveryBriefLog: 7 sections, hypothesis-scored, attached to opp
Meeting attendees: VP RevOps + Director Operations + IT Architecture

steps.title: Discovery call: AGT-407 ConvIntelligence — positive sentiment, champion identified
steps.what_changed: ConvIntelligence emits 5-dimension transcript analysis. Champion confirmed (VP RevOps). 4 next-steps committed. AGT-401 Deal Health = 71 (Yellow → progressing).
evidence: ConvIntelligence: overall_sentiment=positive, prospect_sentiment=positive
sentiment_drivers: ['champion engaged', 'pain validated', 'budget signaled', 'integration concern noted']
Opportunities.health=71 (9-dimension scoring)

steps.title: AGT-403 surfaces DataDog competitive concern; AGT-405 generates negotiation brief
steps.what_changed: AGT-403 reactive brief: DataDog mentioned in last call ('value-based pricing concern'). CompetitiveKnowledgeBase entry pre-populated. AGT-401 Deal Health rises to 88 (Green) on milestone progress. AGT-405 generates late-stage opportunity brief (QuoteLog + MAP).
evidence: CompetitiveKnowledgeBase: DataDog vs us, 3 reactive talking points pre-populated
Opportunities.health=88, MutualActionPlan: 6 of 8 milestones complete
OpportunityBriefLog: late-stage trigger fired, brief delivered to AE

steps.title: AGT-406 quote: $221K ACV / 12mo / consumption-based core SKU
steps.what_changed: Quote drafted via AGT-406 4-tier approval. 2 procurement revisions accepted. Discount within authority (12% < 15% threshold for AE+SLM gate).
evidence: QuoteLog: arr_usd=221059, term=12mo, sku='consumption_core' + 141 seats
QuoteApprovalLog: tier-2 approval (AE + SLM), final discount=12%
AGT-104 audit: signature completeness verified for downstream comp gate

steps.title: Closed Won. AGT-801 OrderManagement → AGT-802 begins billing
steps.what_changed: Quote→Order handoff. OrderApprovalLog two-track approval enforced. AGT-103 retires quota; comp payout queued (gated by MAP sign-off via AGT-601 → AGT-104).
evidence: OrderLog: order_id created, line_items reference QuoteLog
InvoiceLog: first invoice scheduled for Day -22 + 30 (net-30 terms)
QuotaRetirementLedger: $221,059 retired against MM AE West Q-quota

steps.title: AGT-601 onboarding kickoff; MAP signed off; AGT-104 lifts comp hold
steps.what_changed: AGT-601 launches MAP. Champion + IT Architecture sign off MAP. AGT-104 detects MAP completion, lifts comp payout hold. AGT-602 begins technical implementation (6-milestone track). AGT-501 emits day-one CustomerHealthLog.
evidence: OnboardingLog: kickoff_at=Day -8, MAP signature complete
TechnicalMilestoneLog: 0/6 milestones complete (kickoff state)
CustomerHealthLog: score=72 (day-one baseline, no NULL state)
ExceptionLog → CompAuditLog: comp hold released for MM AE West

steps.title: Early adoption strong: AGT-501 health 82 (Green); 4 of 6 milestones complete
steps.what_changed: AGT-501 daily score climbs to 82. AGT-602 records 4/6 milestones (data ingestion, SSO, first integration, first dashboard). AGT-407 monthly call summary shows continued positive sentiment, no objections.
evidence: CustomerHealthLog: score=82, tier=Green, trajectory=improving
TechnicalMilestoneLog: 4/6 complete, on-track for 90-day go-live
ConvIntelligence: 3 calls in window, all overall_sentiment=positive

steps.title: AGT-503 fires: consumption 2.1× baseline. Real expansion or one-time spike?
steps.what_changed: UsageMeteringLog: trailing-30 consumption running at 2.1× contract baseline. AGT-503 fires (UsageMeteringLog bypass path, score 70+). RevOps queries the Account Brain to qualify the signal before launching an expansion play.
evidence: UsageMeteringLog: 30-day consumption 2.1× baseline, consistent_overage=true
ExpansionLog: signal_id created, score=78, suppression_history=clean
AGT-503 → AGT-902 (operator-invoked): brain query triggered

brain_moment.framing: RevOps query: 'AGT-503 fired with consumption overage on this account. Is this real expansion, and what's the play?' Brain calls TOOL-004 to validate trajectory and TOOL-008 to assess feature-level adoption depth before recommending an action.

steps.title: Followup brain query: is the expansion signal cross-team-real or single-team-siloed?
steps.what_changed: Same account, sharper question. Confirms TOOL-008 detects siloed_by_team adoption — concentration index 0.485, port operations team using 12 features, procurement and 3PL using only 2 each. Brain proposes opening expansion play with cross-team integration angle, NOT a seat-uplift discount.
evidence: TOOL-008 result: primary_pattern=siloed_by_team, expansion_signal=moderate, churn_signal=none
BrainAnalysisLog: open_expansion_play action drafted with confidence=high
Lineage: originating_proposal_id retained for cohort-retrospective

brain_moment.framing: Followup query: 'Consumption overage fired on this account, but I want to know whether the depth of adoption supports a real cross-team expansion play, or whether usage is concentrated in one team.' Brain output drafts a SalesPlayLibrary entry with full lineage to the originating analysis.

steps.title: RevOps picks up the SalesPlayLibrary draft, refines, approves
steps.what_changed: RevOps + MM SLM transition the draft from `draft` → `under_review` → `active`. They edit suggested_cadence to 8 touches with in-app added (TOOL-003 had proposed 6 touches). They tighten target_meeting_rate to 0.65 (TOOL-003 had estimated 0.75). Volume cap (max 5 active plays per segment per quarter) enforced at write — passes.
evidence: SalesPlayLibrary.state: draft → under_review (picked_up_by_user_id=revops_lead)
edits_during_review: cadence steps changed, target rates tightened
SalesPlayLibrary.state: under_review → active (slm_approver + revops_approver both set)

steps.title: AGT-302 executes the active play; procurement intro happens; new opp opens
steps.what_changed: AGT-302 reads only `active` plays, generates per-account cadence events. Champion (VP RevOps) facilitates intro to procurement. New opportunity opened: $145K incremental ARR for procurement-team consumption tier. AGT-401 emits health=85 (Green) on new opp.
evidence: CadenceEventLog: 8 events fired across 21 days, all delivered (no AGT-302 gate blocks)
Opportunities: new opp_id, type=expansion, arr_potential=145000, health=85
AGT-303 weekly analysis: 30-event sample met, sequence performing within expected envelope

steps.title: T-90 renewal: AGT-502 ChurnRiskLog low risk; AGT-603 schedules QBR
steps.what_changed: AGT-502 evaluates with renewal-proximity multiplier; tier=low_risk. AGT-603 dual-trigger schedules QBR (90 days before renewal AND expansion play active). AGT-501 health = 89. AGT-704 will pull QBRLog for the next monthly business review's NRR section.
evidence: ChurnRiskLog: tier=low_risk, drivers=['expansion_active', 'health_green', 'champion_engaged']
QBRLog: scheduled for Day 295, agenda includes expansion-play retrospective
BusinessReviewLog (MBR Day 290): Stark Logistics surfaces in NRR risk-adjacent narrative section

steps.title: Renewal + expansion closed at $355K. NRR = 161%.
steps.what_changed: Original $221K renewal + $145K expansion - $11K seat trim. AGT-804 ASC 606 amortizes new annualized contract value. AGT-103 retires quota. AGT-702 GTM Health Monitor: NRR contribution from this account = 161% (one of MM segment's top 3 expansion outcomes for the period).
evidence: OrderLog (renewal): arr_usd=354895, term=12mo
RevenueRecognitionLog: monthly schedule updated, ratable + consumption components
MetricsCalcLog (T+30 day snapshot): NRR contribution captured
